description: إنشاء هيكل مجلد وكيل تحليل الأكواد CodeAnalyzer
command_preview:
import os
base = r'C:\Users\Revexn\CodeAnalyzer'
dirs = [base, os.path.join(base,'reports'), os.path.join(base,'screenshots'), os.path.join(base,'logs'), os.path.join(base,'tools')]
for d in dirs:
    os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
# Create __init__.py for tools package
with open(os.path.join(base,'tools','__init__.py'), 'w') as f:
    f.write('')
print('CREATED DIRS:')
for d in dirs:
    print(f'  {d} -> {os.path.exists(d)}')
print(f'Structure ready at {base}')
output:
CREATED DIRS:
  C:\Users\Revexn\CodeAnalyzer -> True
  C:\Users\Revexn\CodeAnalyzer\reports -> True
  C:\Users\Revexn\CodeAnalyzer\screenshots -> True
  C:\Users\Revexn\CodeAnalyzer\logs -> True
  C:\Users\Revexn\CodeAnalyzer\tools -> True
Structure ready at C:\Users\Revexn\CodeAnalyzer
